title: tanacetum gracilicaule
intro: Tanacetum gracilicaule, also known as the dwarf tansy, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum gracilicaule are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum gracilicaule can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
